assumptions.text: Client will facilitate timely access to relevant communications team members, leadership, and subject matter experts as needed throughout the engagement.
Client will provide reasonable access to relevant internal documents, existing AI tools, communications workflows, and background information required for assessment and programme design.
Project scope, timeline, and pricing are based on the information provided in the client brief. Material changes to scope, team size, or organizational context may require a change order.
Travel and accommodation expenses, if required for on-site workshops or team sessions, will be billed at cost with prior client approval. Remote delivery is the default where feasible.

All parties will adhere to strict confidentiality regarding engagement details, strategic advice, and internal communications workflows shared during the engagement. AI4Comms will not disclose the engagement or client identity without prior written consent.
Timelines assume client review and approval of deliverables within 5 business days of submission. Delays in client feedback may impact overall project timelines.

disclaimers.text: AI adoption outcomes, efficiency improvements, and governance effectiveness projections are based on our professional judgment and comparable engagements. Actual outcomes depend on organizational context, team adoption rates, technology developments, and regulatory evolution.
This proposal is valid for 30 days from the date of submission. After this period, pricing and team availability are subject to reconfirmation.

References to AI tools, platforms, or technology providers are based on our independent professional assessment and do not constitute a commercial endorsement. AI4Comms does not take commercial relationships with AI vendors.

legalTerms.title: Intellectual Property
legalTerms.text: All deliverables created specifically for this engagement become the client's property upon final payment. AI4Comms (a brand of Duke Strategy & Corporate Affairs B.V.) retains ownership of pre-existing methodologies, frameworks, training materials, and playbooks, granting the client a perpetual, non-exclusive license for internal use.

legalTerms.title: Confidentiality
legalTerms.text: Both parties agree to maintain strict confidentiality of all proprietary and sensitive information disclosed during the engagement, including internal workflows, AI governance decisions, and strategic advice. This obligation survives for 5 years following engagement completion.

legalTerms.title: Limitation of Liability
legalTerms.text: AI4Comms' (Duke Strategy & Corporate Affairs B.V.) total aggregate liability under this engagement shall not exceed two times (2x) the total fees paid. Neither party shall be liable for indirect, consequential, incidental, or punitive damages.

legalTerms.title: Termination
legalTerms.text: Either party may terminate this engagement with 14 calendar days' written notice. Upon termination, the client shall pay for all work completed to date. Deliverables and materials produced to date shall be transferred to the client.

legalTerms.title: Change Management
legalTerms.text: Changes to project scope, timeline, or deliverables require a written change order agreed by both parties. Change orders will specify the impact on fees, timeline, and deliverables.
